title: Fabulous Kanna
description: This project is no longer being updated
body:
_This project is no longer being updated_

# Fabulous Kanna

This started as a selection of mods and resources for myself to use and become a modpack to share with friends. I have decided to make it public so others can follow the lasted updates to what I use.

The pack focuses on optimization and shaders, but with mods like Figura that let the player have a custom player model. I want to encourage users of this modpack to get creative and make their own content so I have included many mods that can help.

The mods contained are all client-side and can be used on any server.
At the moment it is limited to 1.20.4, but as I focus the modpack around the mod Figura it will take time to add more versions.

# Features
- Optimization
- Shaders for low-end and high-end hardware
- Enhanced animations and models
- Enhanced sounds and music
- Enhanced camera effects
- Enhanced GUI for immersion and ease of use
- Custom model and emote support via Figura
- Vanilla-themed resource packs
- Quality of life changes

## Important information
The versions of these mods are specific. To make sure it does not break, do not update them and wait for the modpack to be updated.

Icon art created by roseyy.
Character belongs to me.

Disclaimer: When installing version 1.20 (latest) it still uses the old art by Aqsnl. Working on fixing this.
